case_title: ANA VALLE VS. RICARDO RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER NINA SAFDIE PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO RICARDO RODRIGUEZ
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-01-2010 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-03-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT RICARDO RODRIGUEZ' NEW ADDRESS. FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RICARDO

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RICARDO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,465.00 FILED BY VALLE, ANA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RICARDO PEREZ, SOCCORO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLE, ANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RICARDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.00, DEFENDANT SOCCORO PEREZ DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF PROOF. RENT FOR FIVE MONTHS ($650.00 X5) LESS DEDUCTION FOR POOR CONDITION OF THE ROOM. DEFENDANT MAY PAY JUGDMENT IN INSTALLMENTS IF HE FILES A REQUEST WITH THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, RICARDO
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUN-28-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO BRING 3 MONTHS OF FINANCIAL INFORMATIONS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2009 - JUDGMENT.

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SOCCORO PEREZ BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-12-2009 AT 3:30PM.
